            maint_act_type
        )
    ),
    'BadgeCanvas.ThemeColor'.Brand,
    'BadgeCanvas.ThemeColor'.Important
)

        )

)

"<svg viewBox=""0 0 24 24"" fill=""none"" xmlns=""http://www.w3.org/2000/svg""><g id=""SVGRepo_bgCarrier"" stroke-width=""0""></g><g id=""SVGRepo_tracerCarrier"" stroke-linecap=""round"" stroke-linejoin=""round""></g><g id=""SVGRepo_iconCarrier""> <path d=""M6 4H18M4 11H20M3 18L21 18M9.0002 3.00005L4.00009 21M20 21L15 3"" stroke=""#FFFFFF"" stroke-width=""2"" stroke-linecap=""round"" stroke-linejoin=""round""></path> </g></svg>"

SortByColumns(
   Filter(
        tbl_mrl_workorder,
        (
            (varUserRecord.department.Value = "TNMD" && (work_centre.Value = "TNM1" || work_centre.Value = "TNM2")) ||
            (varUserRecord.department.Value = "WS10" && work_centre.Value = "WS10") ||
            (varUserRecord.department.Value = "WS20" && work_centre.Value = "WS20") ||
            (varUserRecord.department.Value = "RSDM" && work_centre.Value = "RSDM")
        )
       &&
        If(
            !IsBlank(ddStatusSort.Selected) && ddStatusSort.Selected.code_name <> "ALL",
            status_workorder_dmp.Id = ddStatusSort.Selected.ID,
            true
        )
        
    ),
    "Created",
    If(ddSortOrder.Selected.Value = "DESC", SortOrder.Descending, SortOrder.Ascending)
)

// ✅ NON-SUPERVISOR
SortByColumns(
    Filter(
        tbl_mrl_workorder,
        (
            (varUserRecord.department.Value = "TNMD" && (operation_workcenter.Value = "TNM1" || operation_workcenter.Value = "TNM2")) ||
            (varUserRecord.department.Value = "WS10" && operation_workcenter.Value = "WS10") ||
            (varUserRecord.department.Value = "WS20" && operation_workcenter.Value = "WS20") ||
            (varUserRecord.department.Value = "RSDM" && operation_workcenter.Value = "RSDM")
        )
        &&
        (
            IsBlank(ddStatusSort.Selected) || 
            ddStatusSort.Selected.code_name = "ALL" ||
            status_workorder_dmp.Value = ddStatusSort.Selected.code_name
        )
    ),
    "Created",
    If(
        ddSortOrder.Selected.Value = "DESC",
        SortOrder.Descending,
        SortOrder.Ascending
    )
)
